image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if your heartbeat is telling you more than you think?
Context visual: An ECG, or electrocardiogram, captures the electrical activity of your heart.
Escalation visual: But why is this important? Your heart's rhythm can reveal hidden issues.
Evidence visual: For instance, irregularities can indicate arrhythmias or even heart attacks.
Payoff visual: Understanding ECGs empowers you to take charge of your health.
Cta visual: Curious about your heart’s health? Explore ECGs further and stay informed!
